name: Charred Pepper Skewers
recipeInstructions:
1. Deseed and chop the peppers.
2. Cut the onion into wedges and slice the courgettes thickly.
3. Add the chopped peppers to a bowl with the onion wedges and sliced courgette.
4. Stir in the olive oil and crushed garlic, then toss well.
5. Thread the mixture onto skewers.
6. Cook on the barbecue for 10-15 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
